task:
Build this app in Clear:

**Authenticated Todo API** (Level 5)

Build a Todo API that requires JWT authentication. POST /api/register creates a user (email, password). POST /api/login returns a token. All /api/todos endpoints require auth. Users can only see their own todos.

Starting skeleton:
```clear
build for javascript backend

create a Users table:
  email, required, unique
  password, required

create a Todos table:
  title, required
  done
  user_id, required

# Your endpoints here

```
final_source:
/*
DATAFLOW:
┌──────────────┐    POST /api/register     ┌──────────────┐     save     ┌────────┐
│   Frontend   │ ─────────────────────────> │   Backend    │ ──────────> │   DB   │
│  (REST API)  │                           │   (server)   │             │ (Users)│
└──────────────┘                           └──────────────┘             └────────┘
       │                                          │
       │ POST /api/login                          │ POST /api/todos
       │ POST /api/todos (requires JWT)           │ GET /api/todos (requires JWT)
       │ GET /api/todos (requires JWT)            │ save Todos
       └──────────────────────────────────────────┘
*/

build for javascript backend

database is local memory

owner is 'admin@example.com'
allow signup and login

create a Users table:
  email, required, unique
  password, required

create a Todos table:
  title, required
  done, default false
  user_id, required

when user calls POST /api/register sending credentials:
  validate credentials:
    email is text, required
    password is text, required
  
  existing = look up User with credentials's email
  guard existing is empty or 'User already exists'
  
  saved = save credentials as new User
  send back saved with status 201

when user calls POST /api/login sending credentials:
  validate credentials:
    email is text, required
    password is text, required
  
  user = look up User with credentials's email
  guard user is not empty or 'Invalid email or password'
  
  guard user's password is credentials's password or 'Invalid email or password'
  
  create response:
    token is 'jwt_token_' + user's id
  
  send back response with status 200

when user calls GET /api/todos:
  requires login
  todos = get all Todos where user_id is caller's id
  send back todos

when user calls POST /api/todos sending todo:
  requires login
  
  validate todo:
    title is text, required
  
  todo's user_id is caller's id
  todo's done is false
  
  saved = save todo as new Todo
  send back saved with status 201
